mapper.select: select sb.* from bot_repo_rel brr left join repo r on r.core_repo_id = brr.repo_id left join spark_bot sb on sb.id = brr.bot_id where r.id = #{repoId} and sb.user_id = #{uid}
select sb.* from bot_tool_rel btr left join spark_bot sb on sb.id = btr.bot_id where btr.tool_id = #{toolId} and sb.user_id = #{uid}
select sb.*, btr.tool_id from bot_tool_rel btr left join spark_bot sb on sb.id = btr.bot_id;
SELECT x.* FROM spark_bot x where x.deleted = 0 and x.id = #{botId}

SELECT count(1) from spark_bot sb
and (POSITION(#{content} IN sb.name) > 0 or POSITION(#{content} IN sb.description) > 0)
and sb.bot_tag LIKE CONCAT('%', #{tags}, '%')
and sb.id in
#{id}
and sb.is_public = 1
and sb.deleted = 0 ;

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spark_bot sb LEFT JOIN bot_model_config bmc ON sb.id = bmc.bot_id WHERE sb.user_id = #{uid} and sb.deleted = 0 and (JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(CAST(bmc.model_config AS JSON), '$.modelConfig.models.plan.domain')) = #{domain} or JSON_UNQUOTE(JSON_EXTRACT(CAST(bmc.model_config AS JSON), '$.modelConfig.models.summary.domain')) = #{domain});

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM spark_bot sb LEFT JOIN bot_model_config bmc ON sb.id = bmc.bot_id WHERE sb.user_id = #{uid} and sb.deleted = 0 and ((bmc.model_config::jsonb -> 'modelConfig' -> 'models' -> 'plan' ->> 'domain') = #{domain} or (bmc.model_config::jsonb -> 'modelConfig' -> 'models' -> 'summary' ->> 'domain') = #{domain});
